title: aconitum gracile subsp. judenbergense
intro: Aconitum gracile subsp. judenbergense, a subspecies of the Aconitum gracile plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, as it contains aconitine and other alkaloids with analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aconitum gracile subsp. judenbergense include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved respiratory function, although its toxicity and potential side effects must be carefully managed. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, and are usually available in the form of tinctures, infusions, or dried roots.
